title: neuroloma simulatrix
side_effects: Neuroloma simulatrix can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can lead to neurological damage, including memory loss and tremors. In extreme cases, improper use of the neuroloma simulatrix plant has been linked to coma and even death. Additionally, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can disrupt normal bodily functions, causing irregular heartbeat and respiratory problems.
